name: TeknoParrot / Modern Arcade PC

bios.notes: Modern arcade PC loaders rely on profiles, installed game folders, and runtime dependencies rather than standard ROM BIOS files.

library_behavior.playlist_target_preference: profile XML, shortcut, or launcher script

notes: Do not rewrite profiles, installed game paths, or loader configs automatically.
TeknoParrot-style libraries are launcher/config heavy and should remain read-only until user-approved repair plans exist.
